tours.name: ARALIYA BEACH RESORT
tours.description:
Wake up to the sound of waves and the scent of the ocean breeze at Araliya Beach Resort. This five-star gem in Sri Lanka is your ultimate tropical escape, offering world-class amenities, breathtaking views, and pure serenity.

Indulge in luxurious spa treatments, feast on gourmet cuisine, and soak up the sun by the infinity pool. Whether you're seeking romance, adventure, or total relaxation — this is where unforgettable memories begin.

tours.name: PARALIA BEACH PHU QUOC
tours.description:
Crystal-clear waters, golden sands, and lush palm trees — welcome to your personal paradise in Phu Quoc. Paralia Beach Resort is where you disconnect from the hustle and reconnect with nature and yourself.

With beachfront bungalows, a chilled-out vibe, and cocktails served under the stars, this tropical getaway is perfect for couples, honeymooners, or anyone craving that Instagram-perfect escape.

tours.name: GRAND BELLA HOTEL
tours.description:
Grand Bella Hotel puts you in the heart of Thailand’s vibrant culture. You're just steps away from markets, temples, nightlife, and delicious street food that never sleeps.

Relax in modern, cozy rooms, unwind by the rooftop pool, and let the city energize you. Whether you’re here to party or explore, this hotel is your stylish and affordable launchpad.

tours.name: FORTUNE HOTEL DEIRA
tours.description:
Get a taste of Dubai's glam without the luxury price tag. Fortune Hotel Deira offers comfort and elegance in the heart of the city, steps away from bustling souks and iconic skyscrapers.

Whether you're on a business trip or a quick getaway, this hotel gives you premium comfort, rooftop views, and easy access to the city's hottest spots.

tours.name: SANDS DOWNTOWN HOTEL
tours.description:
Live your Mediterranean dream at Sands Downtown Hotel in Antalya. Imagine waking up to sea breezes, sipping wine on the terrace, and diving into turquoise waters within minutes.

Blending modern luxury with historic charm, this hotel is your gateway to everything — beaches, bazaars, ruins, and nightlife. Come for the views, stay for the vibe.

tours.name: ISTANBUL GRAND HOTEL
tours.description:
Get lost in the beauty of Istanbul’s rich culture while enjoying modern luxury at Istanbul Grand Hotel. Located near iconic landmarks like Hagia Sophia and the Grand Bazaar, it's a dream for history lovers.

Start your day with Turkish coffee, explore ancient streets, and return to cozy, elegant rooms with five-star service. A perfect blend of East meets West.

tours.name: OCEAN VIEW PARADISE
tours.description:
Private beach. Overwater villa. Sunset in your infinity pool. Ocean View Paradise in the Maldives is what luxury dreams are made of.

Snorkel in coral reefs, dine by the water, and lose yourself in the endless blues. This is not just a vacation — it’s a once-in-a-lifetime escape to absolute paradise.

tours.name: HORIZON SKY HOTEL
tours.description:
Looking for charm on a budget? Horizon Sky Hotel in Greece offers epic views, Mediterranean cuisine, and a cozy vibe that’s hard to beat.

Explore ancient ruins by day, chill on the beach by evening, and enjoy authentic Greek hospitality every moment in between.

tours.name: TROPICAL BREEZE RESORT
tours.description:
Welcome to your Bali fantasy. Tropical Breeze Resort surrounds you with palm trees, exotic flowers, and golden beaches just a walk away.

Start your morning with sunrise yoga, spend afternoons exploring temples, and wind down with a sunset cocktail and ocean breeze. Pure bliss awaits.

tours.name: CITY LIGHTS HOTEL
tours.description:
City vibes, skyline views, and all of Manhattan at your doorstep. City Lights Hotel is your gateway to NYC’s most iconic attractions.

Whether you're chasing Broadway shows, high-end shopping, or late-night diners, this hotel gives you front-row access to the city that never sleeps — in style.

tours.name: ROYAL PALACE HOTEL
tours.description:
Live like royalty in the heart of Paris. Royal Palace Hotel is elegance defined, with rooms fit for a king and views of the Eiffel Tower.

Savor fine dining, stroll the Champs-Élysées, and immerse yourself in art, romance, and timeless charm. Paris is always a good idea — especially here.

tours.name: DESERT MIRAGE RESORT
tours.description:
Step into a mystical Moroccan dream at Desert Mirage Resort in Marrakech. Think vibrant mosaics, rooftop terraces, and magical sunsets over the dunes.

Unplug and unwind with traditional hammams, mint tea under the stars, and the exotic charm of Marrakech all around you.

tours.name: ALPINE RETREAT HOTEL
tours.description:
Escape to the mountains and breathe in the crisp Alpine air at Alpine Retreat Hotel. Nestled in the Swiss Alps, this cozy hideaway is a snow-lover’s heaven in winter and a hiking dream in summer.

With fireplace lounges, panoramic balconies, and the purest nature all around, it’s the retreat your soul has been craving.

tours.name: PACIFIC WAVES HOTEL
tours.description:
Surf, sun, and aloha vibes — welcome to Pacific Waves Hotel in Hawaii. Steps from the beach, this tropical escape is perfect for thrill-seekers and chill-lovers alike.

Catch waves by day, enjoy fire shows by night, and fall asleep to the sound of the ocean. Paradise is calling — are you in?

tours.name: SAND DUNES LUXURY RESORT
tours.description:
Experience the ultimate desert fantasy at Sand Dunes Luxury Resort in Dubai. Ride camels at sunset, dine under the stars, and relax in extravagant suites fit for a sheikh.

It’s a mix of Arabian tradition and futuristic opulence — where every moment feels like a movie scene.

tours.name: NORTHERN LIGHTS HOTEL
tours.description:
Watch the sky dance above you at Northern Lights Hotel in Norway. This cozy Arctic getaway offers front-row seats to nature’s most magical show — the aurora borealis.

Warm up in a sauna, enjoy Nordic cuisine, and fall asleep under glass ceilings as green lights swirl overhead. Bucket-list level experience guaranteed.

tours.name: JUNGLE ESCAPE LODGE
tours.description:
Get wild in Costa Rica’s lush rainforests at Jungle Escape Lodge. Here, toucans wake you up and waterfalls guide your path.

With eco-chic cabins, thrilling adventures, and nature everywhere, this is your perfect off-the-grid reset with all the good vibes and zero stress.

tours.name: SUNSET BAY HOTEL
tours.description:
Golden hour never looked so good. Sunset Bay Hotel in California offers epic ocean views, boho-chic rooms, and sunsets that hit your soul.

Chill on the beach, explore coastal towns, and snap that postcard-perfect photo — every evening ends with a view you’ll never forget.

tours.name: GRAND HORIZON HOTEL
tours.description:
Sky-high views and cutting-edge design — welcome to Grand Horizon Hotel in Tokyo. Located in the city’s heart, it gives you instant access to neon streets, sushi spots, and peaceful temples.

Recharge in sleek rooms above the skyline, enjoy Michelin-level dining, and live Tokyo’s electric pulse in full style.
